bookSourceComment:
基于番茄API的阅读书源（第三版，二合一）
——搜索提示——
如需听书[AI朗读]，搜索如“@禁神之下”（请先在右上角三个点，点击登录按钮切换音色）
如需听书[真人朗读]，搜索如“!禁神之下”（注意是英文感叹号）
——阅读提示——
1.[AI朗读]和[阅读小说]在书架只能共存一本，如需更改，请删除书籍后重新搜索
2.真人朗读无1中问题
——注意事项——
可下书，为保证API可用性，免费用户每天最多阅读200章，禁止倒卖或违法用途，仅用于学习交流
bookSourceName: Rain API V3 - 番茄小说

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.name: book_name

ruleContent.content:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(result)
	if(res.type=='audio'){
		result = res.data.audio1
		if(res.change == 'true') java.toast("\n该小说不支持本音色，已自动切换至成熟大叔音色\n注：该操作仅对该书籍有效！")
		content = result
	}
	else{
	result = res.data.content
 content = result
}
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let replaceCover = (u) => {
// java.log(u)
if (u.startsWith("https://")) u = u.substring(8)
else u = u.substring(7)
let uArr = u.split("/")
uArr[0] = "https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin"
let uArr2 = []
uArr.forEach((x) => {
    if (!x.includes("?") && !x.includes("~")) uArr2.push(x)
    else uArr2.push(x.split("~")[0])
	})
u = uArr2.join("/")
return u
	}
  let list = [];
  let resultData = JSON.parse(result).data;
  // java.log(resultData)
  let data;
  if (resultData != null && resultData.book_shelf_info) {
    data = resultData.book_shelf_info;
    if (data != null) {
    let requestData = { books: [] };
    for (let i in data) {
      requestData["books"].push({
        book_id: data[i]["book_id"],
        item_id: "0",
      });
    }
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(resultData.book_shelf_info))
    let booksData = java.ajax(
      'https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{method: "post",body: ' +
        JSON.stringify(requestData) +
        "}"
    );
    // java.log(booksData)
    let books =  JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
      let d = books[i];
      list.push({
        src: d,
        book_name: d.book_name,
        thumb_url: replaceCover(d.thumb_url),
        abstract: d.abstract,
        book_id: d.book_id,
      });
    }
    }
  } else list = JSON.parse(result)[0].content
  JSON.stringify(list)
</js>$[*]
ruleExplore.name: $.book_name

ruleSearch.author: author
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(result)
if(res.message!=='SUCCESS'){
java.toast(res.data.content)}
let books
if (res.search_tabs) {
  res.search_tabs.forEach((i) => {
    if (i.data !== null) books = i.data
  })
} else books = res.data

let results = []

books.forEach(w => {
  results.push(w.book_data[0])
})

JSON.stringify(results)
</js>$[*]
ruleSearch.checkKeyWord: 转生三无猫娘，成神的我只想摸鱼
ruleSearch.name: book_name

ruleToc.chapterUrl:
<js>
var tone = JSON.parse(source.getVariable()).tone;
if(book.type == 8) url = '{{source.bookSourceUrl}}&type=4&itemid={{$.item_id}}'
else url = '{{source.bookSourceUrl}}&type=4&itemid={{$.item_id}}&'+tone
</js>
